title: Bhediya
tmdbOverview: Inspired by legendary folklore rooted in Arunachal Pradesh, Bhediya tells the story of Bhaskar, a man who gets bitten by a mythical wolf and begins to transform into the creature himself. As Bhaskar and his ragtag buddies try to find answers, he is worried that the monster in him will wipe out human existence in the local town.
synopsis: Released in 2022, Bhediya is a horror and comedy film from India. It carries a 6.7 rating on IMDb. It's one of the titles we feature across our 2020s and genre rankings. It carries a UA certification (IN rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
